event_name: Automate High-Scale Performance Testing for Resilient Web Applications on AWS
description: Discover how to automate high-scale, multi-region performance testing on AWS using ECS Fargate, JMeter scripts, and monitoring strategies.

event_name: Introducing Amazon Q: The Future of GenAI Assistance
description: Learn how Amazon Q uses foundation models and your organization's content to generate relevant, timely insights for your workflows.

event_name: Serverless Workshop: Lambda and API Gateway
description: Hands-on lab to build serverless applications with AWS Lambda and API Gateway. Learn best practices for production-ready APIs.

event_name: AWS Security Best Practices and Compliance
description: Deep dive into AWS security, IAM best practices, encryption, and compliance frameworks for enterprise deployments.
